title: Dart
description: Dart documents overview material for Dart in the language domain. It is classified as an entity page for the programming-language class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page provides focused notes, examples, commands, diagrams, or references when the source content provides them. Important search terms include programming language, and language, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / dart / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
